Yes, I will be having a Conversation with him, live at the Cato Institute on September 26th, here is some basic information:
Website: [https://www.cato.org/events/false-dawn-new-deal-promise-recovery-1933-1947](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=470beb78dac728b65baa3638c599ef4a8e41b940fb35b531275ceebc5c442fd3&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91152&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=2fcb316a57fc3b26d60678ad78265788&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=2d9d51eba6add24b67c50d97876bb9bc)
Registration: [https://register.cato.org/false-dawn-new-deal-promise-recovery-1933-1947/register](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=82595d7ae39d1aeac1dc5b1eaec8e5644db2a2937b92201b72f5d3a43f197391&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91152&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=58afdd870e62d22e8a0ecd929145cef7&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=2d9d51eba6add24b67c50d97876bb9bc)
We will start with George's new and excellent book [False Dawn: The New Deal and the Promise of Recovery 1933-1947](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=1393b0b461930978f3094af53d6bf743b44669825b8e14a22f7355500117dbe8&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91152&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=ca5d7cbeb88cec25f451834e5b41e543&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=2d9d51eba6add24b67c50d97876bb9bc). But of course George has a long and distinguished record in monetary economics, free banking, macro, and ngdp ideas, as well as productivity norms for monetary policy.
So what should I ask him?
